user.title: Zerobyte Backup
user.description: Choose how to authenticate with your Zerobyte instance

password.title: Zerobyte Backup

api_key.title: Zerobyte Backup
api_key.description: Connect to your Zerobyte instance using an API key (requires Zerobyte v0.40.0+). Create one under Settings > API Keys in Zerobyte.
